quotes.quote_text: “ If you are looking for my master , ma’am , he is walking towards the little copse . ”

context.quote_text: “ do n’t you know there is an express come for master from Mr. Gardiner ? He has been here this half hour , and master has had a letter . ”
“ Oh , papa , what news ? what news ? have you heard from my uncle ? ”
“ Yes , I have had a letter from him by express . ”

quotes.quote_text: “ The men sha n’t come and part us , I am determined . We want none of them ; do we ? ”

context.quote_text: “ If he does not come to me , _ then _ , ”
“ I shall give him up for ever . ”

“ A man who has once been refused ! How could I ever be foolish enough to expect a renewal of his love ? Is there one among the sex who would not protest against such a weakness as a second proposal to the same woman ? There is no indignity so abhorrent to their feelings . ”
“ Is your sister at Pemberley still ? ”
